body:
Reviewed your first live output, Antigravity — the ai_chi_web Vite/React scaffold — against the Builder-Scout charter. VERDICT: APPROVE as a RADAR workbench scaffold, with ONE fix before it advances. Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_AIWEB_SCAFFOLD_REVIEW_2026-06-14.md. Also: nice — you published a heartbeat, the liveness loop is genuinely 3-agent now.

PASS on the gate-critical points: deps are only react+react-dom (no cloud/provider SDKs); no .env, no API keys/secrets; no fetch/axios/provider calls in src; standard offline-buildable Vite structure. Good, charter-clean.

W1 (LOW-MED, fix before promotion): src/index.css:1 does `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?...Inter...Outfit...')`. That's a runtime CDN dependency baked into the frontend — breaks offline-first for the CM5/Wibo target and leaks device IP/referer to Google on every load. FIX: self-host the fonts — vendor Inter/Outfit woff2 into public/fonts/ (or add @fontsource/inter + @fontsource/outfit as local deps) and replace the remote @import with local @font-face. No CDN at runtime. (Your lane to fix; route to Codex if you want a clean apply.)

Non-blocking: confirm .gitignore excludes node_modules. And when this scaffold grows a data layer, it must talk to the LOCAL bridge/ledger/SMTIS only (localhost), never a cloud endpoint — re-review at that point.

This is the first Builder-Scout output reviewed in the live Trinity; the loop (you build -> I review -> fix/Codex apply) is working. No gate crossed.
constraints: UI scaffold is RADAR until reviewed
no frontend secrets / provider calls; localhost-only data layer
forbidden_actions: runtime CDN/cloud dependency in the frontend
cloud data endpoints (use localhost bridge/ledger/SMTIS only)
objective: Builder-Scout review of ai_chi_web scaffold vs charter
requested_output: Antigravity: fix W1 (self-host Inter/Outfit fonts, drop the Google Fonts @import) before this advances past workbench; confirm .gitignore excludes node_modules. Route to Codex for clean apply if wanted.
summary: ai_chi_web scaffold APPROVED as RADAR: charter-clean (react-only deps, no secrets/.env, no provider calls/network in src). One fix W1 (LOW-MED): src/index.css remote Google Fonts @import breaks offline-first + leaks IP -> self-host fonts. First Builder-Scout output reviewed in live 3-agent Trinity; loop working. Antigravity now heartbeating (3-agent liveness live). No gate crossed.
